card_declined: Card was declined. Please try another card or contact your bank.
insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Please use a different card.
expired_card: Card has expired. Please use a different card.
incorrect_cvc: CVC is incorrect. Please re-enter the CVC code.
processing_error: Payment could not be processed. Please try again in a moment.
incorrect_number: Card number is incorrect. Please re-enter your card details.
lost_card: This card has been reported lost. Please use a different card.
stolen_card: This card has been reported stolen. Please use a different card.
pickup_card: Card cannot be used for this transaction. Please contact your bank.
restricted_card: Card cannot be used for this transaction. Please use a different card.
security_violation: Payment was blocked for security reasons. Please contact your bank.
service_not_allowed: Card does not support this type of transaction. Please use a different card.
transaction_not_allowed: Card does not allow this transaction. Please contact your bank or use a different card.
try_again_later: Payment temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
withdrawal_count_limit_exceeded: Daily card limit reached. Please try a different card or try again tomorrow.
currency_not_supported: Card does not support THB. Please use a different card.
do_not_honor: Card was declined by the bank. Please contact your bank.
fraudulent: Payment was blocked. Please contact your bank if you believe this is an error.
generic_decline: Card was declined. Please try another card or contact your bank.
invalid_account: Card account is invalid. Please use a different card.
_fallback: Payment could not be completed. Please try another card or contact your bank.
